quality.completeness: High. Contains name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, and full mechanical description.
quality.formatting_notes: The description is clear and functional for game mechanics.

primary_effects: Disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see the wearer (while hood is up).
Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide (while hood is up).
mechanics.action_cost: Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

analysis.archivist_recommendation: Data structure is sound and accurately reflects the item's function. Ready for archival.
